---
title: "main-functions"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{main-functions}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(geographr)
```

```{r}
# not used
plot_regime_gdp(democracy_data, regime_types = c(
  "Civilian Dictatorship",
  "Military Dictatorship"))
```

This should make an area plot showing the mean GDP by regime type from an inputted year range.

```{r}
plot_regime_gdp(plot_data, start_year = 2000, end_year = 2020)
```

This should show how many countries were in each `regime_category` during a selected year.

```{r}
summarize_gdp_by_regime(data, year = NULL)
```

This should find years where a country experienced a regime change using `has_regime_change_lag` and display the associated `regime_category`.
